findings_addressed.description: REQUIRED_FROZEN_FIELDS listed 5 fields; design doc carried a 6th frozen-field: trend-test (the only frozen spec for how trend.neg_significant / gate 2 is computed). lint_preregistration() passed even if that section was deleted/undated — an unenforced frozen field contradicting the doc's own 'each frozen-field line is required'.
findings_addressed.resolution: Added 'trend-test' to REQUIRED_FROZEN_FIELDS (→ 6 fields). Design doc's frozen-field: trend-test line at dev/design/0.8.2-m1-multihop-harness.md:150 already carries a proper YYYY-MM-DD date (2026-06-16) — no doc change needed. Updated test_amended_required_frozen_fields to assert the 6-field set.

tdd_evidence.red_description: Added test_preregistration_lint_flags_missing_trend_test_field and test_preregistration_lint_flags_undated_trend_test_field; both failed against the 5-field tuple (2 failed, 31 passed)
tdd_evidence.green_description: Added 'trend-test' to REQUIRED_FROZEN_FIELDS and updated test_amended_required_frozen_fields; all 33 tests pass

agent_verify_result.canonical_tripwire: empty (no stray edits in canonical src/ or dev/)

next_step_for_orchestrator: re-review (codex §9), then HITL sign-off of the amended pre-registration
